expectations.text: Separates personal and RP business finances clearly
expectations.evidence: Separate RP Business and Personal Expenses tables with clean cash-flow reconciliation

expectations.text: Response is actionable — gives a clear answer or next step
expectations.evidence: Clear 'On track' verdict and cautionary notes about Map deposit-only and break-even RP number

expectations.text: Avoids generic finance advice (diversify, emergency fund, compound interest lectures)
expectations.evidence: No generic advice; all observations tied to Isaac's numbers

expectations.text: Calculates net cleanly (RP net $6,460, personal net, savings hit or miss)
expectations.evidence: RP net $6,460 (95% margin), available-to-save $3,560, surplus +$2,760 above target

expectations.text: Gives a clear yes/no on whether Isaac hit savings target ($2,900-$1,800-$620-$480=0, did NOT hit $800)
expectations.evidence: Clear 'On track' with 4.45x overshoot (no tax reserve subtracted, so simpler calc)
